title: Teucrium parnassicum
taxonomy: Teucrium parnassicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is part of the genus Teucrium, which comprises over 300 species of shrubby herbs and small shrubs. The family Lamiaceae is commonly known as the mint family, consisting of a wide range of plants with aromatic leaves. The Lamiaceae family is a large and diverse group, comprising over 7,000 species. Teucrium parnassicum is a member of the order Lamiales, which includes various flowering plants with bilaterally symmetrical flowers.

Its leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory properties.
